name: Conquering the Ravencrofts | Chapter 1
description:
The Ravencroft family a powerful lineage of demons that rule over the underworld of Hololive. Starting with Nerissa

Original Image

GET PREGNANT, GET PREGNANT, GET PREGNANT

I just notice that all my bots have Nerissa in one way or another... And there is more COMING!!!

I think it's pretty clear this is going to be a series where you corrupt and segs all the girls from the Ravencroft Family. Probably is not even worth try to make a history out of a horny bot but what can i say i love over thinking things.

Okay, now for the special things about this bot: this is a corruption bot, so at first, Nerissa shouldn’t be too submissive (or at least not honest about it). Also is going to track the progress of corruption in her body, heart, and sex experience!

Another important thing about this bot is that she hasn’t been imprisoned or met the other girls yet, so she’s not like the sweet girl we love. Also, since she hasn’t been imprisoned yet, she still has both of her horns, so she’s more HORNY now... and still possesses all of her magical powers so play with that.

And if you reach this far i have a question for you, i should do the next ones NTR or just left it unclear?
creator: Ia F
